reviews.comment:
Sí te toca un día de muchooo viento como. Nos tocó al grupo te permite estar con consumismo en el lugar. Baños limpio. Fui el 15 de febrero 2023, está estación de servicio está en Puerto Pirámides. Lleven siempre, anteojos, pañuelo para el cuello ø un pañuelo de los que te cubren los oídos y una campera abrigada... Muchooooo viento... Antes averiguen el clima... Son cosas personales pequeñas que podés llevar en un bolso.. y protector solarrrr... Es hermoso Puerto Pirámides..

(Translated by Google)
If you happen to be there on a really windy day, like our group was, it allows you to shop there. The restrooms are clean. I went on February 15, 2023; this gas station is in Puerto Pirámides. Always bring sunglasses, a neckerchief or a bandana that covers your ears, and a warm jacket... It's really windy... Check the weather forecast beforehand... These are small personal items you can carry in a bag... and sunscreen! Puerto Pirámides is beautiful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeWVYd3pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me agarro cambio de turno y espere demasiado hasta que vino un empleado y comenzó a atender sin importar ( x q no lo sabia) quien estaba primero y eso genero que esperase en demasía. Si los cambios de horarios se corriesen minutos entre empleados, no se pararía la playa por el tiempo que fuera y todo fluiría.

(Translated by Google)
I was caught off guard by a shift change and had to wait a very long time until an employee finally arrived and started serving customers without regard for who was there first (because they didn't know), which caused me to wait even longer. If shift changes were staggered by a few minutes between employees, the beach wouldn't be shut down for any length of time, and everything would run smoothly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNjR6ZzZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Me atendieron bien, pero luego de la travesía de horas por Península Valdes quise entrar al baño luego de llenar el tanque del auto y no los tenían disponibles...deberían tener esto listo siempre

(Translated by Google)
They treated me well, but after traveling for hours through the Valdes Peninsula, I wanted to use the bathroom after filling up the car's tank, and they didn't have any available...they should always have this ready.
